title: Alfred wastes tokens re-confirming known bugs
description: Alfred called Desktop Commander read_file 5+ times despite LG-S34-003 being listed as RECURRING in the session prompt. Also re-confirmed known CI failures instead of trusting handoff. Institutional knowledge transmission is useless if the receiver ignores it to verify independently.
fix: 1. Add DC read_file workaround to CLAUDE.md hot cache. 2. At session start, parse known findings and skip re-diagnosis. 3. Encode fallback patterns so Alfred uses scripts from cycle 1.
resolution: Added Known Workarounds to CLAUDE.md — Session 35. Full fix requires session-start pattern encoding.
